title: Bartoline Traditional Sugar Soap 500g – Powerful Surface Cleaner for Paint Prep & General Household Cleaning
features: EFFECTIVE SURFACE CLEANER: Bartoline Traditional Sugar Soap is a powerful cleaner used by professionals for preparing surfaces before painting; it cuts through grease, grime, and nicotine stains, making repainting easier and providing a clean base for your paint job.

VERSATILE CLEANING SOLUTION: Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use; it can clean masonry, stonework, garage floors, driveways, and even oil stains on concrete and asphalt; a must-have for household cleaning and paint preparation.

MULTI-PURPOSE USE: Perfect for cleaning building exteriors, flagstones, and toilet bowls; it also works well for cleaning bathrooms, including basins, ceramic tiles, and baths; add to water for effective cleaning power on a variety of surfaces.

EASY TO USE: For paint preparation, mix 500g with 10 liters of warm water; for general cleaning, use 250g per 10 liters of water; it’s easy to apply with a sponge or cloth; rinse with fresh water after use and allow the surface to dry.

IDEAL FOR HEAVY DUTY JOBS: Whether preparing for painting or tackling tough dirt, this sugar soap is your go-to solution for deep cleaning; it’s a trusted product in the DIY and professional communities for years.
description: Product Description Bartoline Traditional Powder Sugar Soap is a powerful and effective non-detergent, low suds cleaner. Blended from several different powders, it has been used by professional decorators for many years’, for preparing surfaces prior to painting. It cuts through grease and grime, including nicotine stains, and makes repainting easier. May be used both inside and outside. Application: Preparing surfaces prior to painting and flattening gloss paint to allow repainting without the need for undercoating. Will remove old paint stains from masonry, facing slabs and stonework. Also suitable for cleaning garage floors and driveways. Will clean oil and grease from concrete and asphalt surfaces; may be used for cleaning baths, basins and ceramic tiles; and for use as a general household cleaner. Ingredients Traditional Sugar Soap 450g Manufacturer Contact Information Traditional Sugar Soap 450g See more
